templates.name: EVE Online by HTTP
templates.description:
EVE Online game monitoring via public APIs.

No agent required — uses HTTP agent items.

Metrics:
- Tranquility status (description, VIP mode, last server start)
- Player count
- PLEX (global market) & Large Skill Injector average prices
- Active incursions and sovereignty campaigns
- Faction Warfare per-faction stats (pilots, systems controlled, kills, victory points)

Data sources:
- ESI API (esi.evetech.net): status, incursions, sovereignty, FW stats, market prices
- EVE status page (status.eveonline.com): public status description

Note: PLEX has used a single global market since the 2018 PLEX Vault migration. Prices come from ESI /markets/prices/ which returns CCP-calculated cross-region averages (smoothed, not real-time best ask).

items.name: ESI status raw
items.description: Master item: raw response from ESI /status (Tranquility). Player count, server start time and VIP flag are extracted by dependent items.

triggers.name: No data from ESI /status for {$EVE.NODATA}
triggers.description: ESI /status endpoint has not returned data within the configured no-data window. ESI may be unreachable or down.

items.name: Faction Warfare: Amarr Empire kills (yesterday)
items.description: Kills credited to the Amarr Empire militia in the previous day (resets daily).

items.name: Faction Warfare: Amarr Empire pilots
items.description: Active pilots enlisted in the Amarr Empire militia.

items.name: Faction Warfare: Amarr Empire systems controlled
items.description: Solar systems currently held by the Amarr Empire militia.

items.name: Faction Warfare: Amarr Empire victory points (yesterday)
items.description: Victory points earned by the Amarr Empire militia in the previous day (resets daily).

items.name: Faction Warfare: Caldari State kills (yesterday)
items.description: Kills credited to the Caldari State militia in the previous day (resets daily).

items.name: Faction Warfare: Caldari State pilots
items.description: Active pilots enlisted in the Caldari State militia.

items.name: Faction Warfare: Caldari State systems controlled
items.description: Solar systems currently held by the Caldari State militia.

items.name: Faction Warfare: Caldari State victory points (yesterday)
items.description: Victory points earned by the Caldari State militia in the previous day (resets daily).

items.name: Faction Warfare: Gallente Federation kills (yesterday)
items.description: Kills credited to the Gallente Federation militia in the previous day (resets daily).

items.name: Faction Warfare: Gallente Federation pilots
items.description: Active pilots enlisted in the Gallente Federation militia.

items.name: Faction Warfare: Gallente Federation systems controlled
items.description: Solar systems currently held by the Gallente Federation militia.

items.name: Faction Warfare: Gallente Federation victory points (yesterday)
items.description: Victory points earned by the Gallente Federation militia in the previous day (resets daily).

items.name: Faction Warfare: Minmatar Republic kills (yesterday)
items.description: Kills credited to the Minmatar Republic militia in the previous day (resets daily).

items.name: Faction Warfare: Minmatar Republic pilots
items.description: Active pilots enlisted in the Minmatar Republic militia.

items.name: Faction Warfare: Minmatar Republic systems controlled
items.description: Solar systems currently held by the Minmatar Republic militia.

items.name: Faction Warfare: Minmatar Republic victory points (yesterday)
items.description: Victory points earned by the Minmatar Republic militia in the previous day (resets daily).

items.name: Faction Warfare stats raw
items.description: Master item: raw response from ESI /fw/stats. Per-faction pilots, systems controlled, kills and victory points are extracted by dependent items.

triggers.name: No data from ESI /fw/stats for {$EVE.NODATA}
triggers.description: Faction Warfare stats endpoint has not returned data within the configured no-data window.

items.name: Active incursions
items.description: Number of active incursions across New Eden (ESI /incursions/).

items.name: Market prices raw
items.description: Master item: raw response from ESI /markets/prices/. Returns CCP-calculated average and adjusted prices per type ID across the entire game (covers global-market items like PLEX as well as regional commodities). CCP-cached for 1h. Dependent items extract specific prices.

triggers.name: No data from ESI /markets/prices/ for {$EVE.NODATA}
triggers.description: ESI /markets/prices/ endpoint has not returned data within the configured no-data window.

items.name: PLEX price
items.description: Average price of 1 PLEX (type 44992) from ESI /markets/prices/. PLEX uses a single global market (no regional orders since the 2018 PLEX Vault migration), so this is CCP's authoritative cross-region average — a smoothed value, not a real-time best ask.

triggers.name: PLEX price below {$PLEX.PRICE.MIN} ISK
triggers.description: PLEX price has dropped below the configured minimum threshold ({$PLEX.PRICE.MIN} ISK).

items.name: Large Skill Injector price
items.description: Average price of 1 Large Skill Injector (type 40520) from ESI /markets/prices/. Cross-region smoothed average from CCP, not a real-time best ask.

triggers.name: Large Skill Injector price below {$EVE.SKILL_INJECTOR.PRICE.MIN} ISK
triggers.description: Large Skill Injector price has dropped below the configured minimum threshold.

items.name: Active sovereignty campaigns
items.description: Number of active sovereignty campaigns across nullsec (ESI /sovereignty/campaigns/).

items.name: Tranquility status description
items.description: Current EVE Online server status from the official status page API. Expected value: "All Systems Operational".

triggers.expression: last(/EVE Online by HTTP/eve.status.description)<>"All Systems Operational" and (time()<110000 or time()>113000)
triggers.name: Tranquility status not operational — check status.eveonline.com
triggers.description: EVE Online server status is not "All Systems Operational". The time window exclusion (11:00–11:30 UTC) avoids false alerts during daily downtime.

items.name: Player count
items.description: Current number of players online on Tranquility (extracted from ESI /status).

items.name: Server start time (last TQ tick)
items.description: Unix timestamp of the last Tranquility startup, derived from ESI /status start_time. Stored as unixtime so dashboards render the local datetime automatically.

items.name: VIP mode
items.description: Whether Tranquility is in VIP mode (login restricted to a small allowlist of players, typically post-DT recovery or incident response). 0 = normal, 1 = VIP.

triggers.name: Tranquility is in VIP mode (login restricted)
triggers.description: ESI reports Tranquility is in VIP mode — only allowlisted players can log in. Typically follows post-DT recovery or active incident response.

macros.description: No-data timeout for master HTTP items. Set higher than the slowest collection interval (30m for FW / sovereignty) to avoid false alerts during transient API failures.
Minimum Large Skill Injector price threshold (ISK). Triggers an INFO alert when the cross-region average price drops below this value.
Minimum PLEX price threshold (ISK). Triggers an INFO alert when the global average price drops below this value.
